error.connection: Could not connect to YouTube API

likes.title: YouTube Likes
likes.description: Connect your YouTube account to sync your liked videos as like posts on your blog. Only new likes (added after connecting) will create posts.
likes.noLikesYet: No liked videos synced yet. New likes you add on YouTube will appear here after the next sync.
likes.baselinePending: Baseline pending — first sync will snapshot existing likes without creating posts.

flash.connected: YouTube account connected successfully. Run a sync to baseline your existing likes.

error.noOAuth: YouTube OAuth is not configured. Set YOUTUBE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID and YOUTUBE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET.
